title: Animator - Animated Placeholders
description: Create custom animated placeholders that you can use anywhere.
body:
![Product Image](https://polymart-attachments.s3.amazonaws.com/uploads/18903/general/6763fffd-5995-d359-47df-d88814ab50e5/Untitled-1.png)

INFORMATION:

A versatile, customizable animated placeholder system for Minecraft servers, enabling administrators to create dynamic placeholders that can be used across various server components. This feature allows for the creation of engaging and visually appealing placeholders that can be tailored to display different animations, messages, or server information. It supports a wide range of animation styles, color codes, and formatting options, ensuring a unique and enhanced user experience. Configuration is straightforward through a YAML file, making it ideal for servers looking to add a personalized touch to their in-game messages and displays. 

FEATURES:

  1. Custom animated placeholders.
  2. 1.8+ support.
  3. Java 8+ support.
  4. Hex colors & legacy color codes support.
  5. Simple config file with examples.
  6. And much more to discover!

OVERVIEW:

TERMS OF SERVICE:

By purchasing from us, you've already agreed to our terms of service and read the product page, understanding its features. You can find the terms here terms of service.

OTHER INFO:
